reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.27

A one-time "what's new" prompt now explains the location-based reminders feature after updating, with a clear skip option (dismissible by button or tapping outside) for anyone who'd rather not read it.

ai-scanner.notes: Adds Export as Markdown on Item Detail: exports a screenshot's summary, extracted text, source link, and tags as a portable .md file with YAML front matter.
